docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ARMENDARIZ, GERALDINE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARMENDARIZ, GERALDINE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF CAN RECEIVE FREE ASSISTANCE FROM LEGAL ASSISTANCE TO THE ELDERLY TO DEVISE A NEW SIMPLE WILL. PLAINTIFF CAN CONTACE CHRISTINE LAU, ESQ.J MON - THURS OR BRITT EVANGELIST, PARALEGAL ASSISTANCE FOR THE ELDERLY. ADDRESS IS: 995 MARKET STREET STE. 1480 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-04-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-08-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NO STIPULATION TO PRO TEM JUDGE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THOMAS, DEMONTEREY AS TO DEFENDANT ARMENDARIZ, GERALDINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
